company.what_they_do: Aghori Media House is a Mumbai-based digital marketing and branding agency. They offer a broad range of services including social media marketing, graphic/creative design, content marketing, web development, business development, event management, ad films, public relations, corporate gifts, printing, and IT solutions. They position themselves as a one-stop branding shop, with offices in Mumbai (Malad West) and Rajkot. The company was incorporated in 2018 (operating since ~2017) and has under 49 employees.
raw_notes: Website: aghorimediahouse.com — confirmed active and matching the email domain.
Tagline: 'We don't merely Build Brands, We Inculcate Brands.'
Describes itself as serving 'hardcore techies and Creative Souls at work.'

Services: Graphic/Creative Designing, Social Media Marketing, Content Marketing, Business Development, Event Management, Web Development, Printing, Ad Films, Public Relations, Corporate Gifts, Corporate Services, IT Solutions.
Founded ~2017; legally incorporated as a Private Limited company on 24 May 2018 (CIN: U93090MH2018PTC309891).
Registered address: 204, Vaishali Shopping Centre, Next To Natraj Market, Malad (W), S.V. Road, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400064.
Also present in Rajkot (per Instagram bio).
Directors per MCA records: Yogesh Bhanjibhai Santoki and Vikee Bhanjibhai Santoki (current); Bhavita Shailesh Thakkar (past).
Listed on DesignRush, Crunchbase, IndiaMART, JustDial (rated 4.7/5 from 60 reviews), LinkedIn (~2,676 followers).
RocketReach lists ~6 employees; Creative Director listed as 'Yosant Patel'.
Expanding from social media marketing roots into broader IT solutions.
